title: GANSO! BanG Dream Chan
overview:
SET RIGHT UP, ROLL ON IN! "GANSO! BanG Dream Chan" is about to start! What d'ya mean GANSO? What is BanG Dream Chan anyway? You might have a lot of questions, but first—empty that noggin, take it easy, and just enjoy the show!

And the price?—pay what it's worth on your way out!

title: Bright Red Sports Car
overview:
“I’ll take that red one, please.”

—Thank you very much. And what about the options?

“Hmm... Even power mirrors count as an option? Forget it, Kasumi, if we go to a local dealer we could get a way better car for cheaper…”

“Nope, it’s fine, Arisa. I’ll take that red one, please.”

title: The Same Place as Always
overview:
On days when something happens, and on days when nothing does, my feet find themselves drawn there, naturally.

Before me stretches a sky dyed red. From time to time, the wind brushes against my skin, pleasantly.

This is the place where we began.

title: The Girl That Can Tell
overview: Rocks are good, good are rocks.

title: Hello Happy Regular Meeting
overview:
Hey Michelle, what's on the agenda today?

Let's make it more globally aligned and really double down on our HLSY commitment.

Totally aligned!

title: As Professionals
overview:
Where there is trust and love,

there's no compromise.

title: Emergence ~ growth ~
overview: A melody dissolving into the silence of the night— The whisper of the night wind awakens me. Where confusion and yearning intertwine, I, the “song,” am born.

title: Pastel Ludo
overview: In Kyoto, Maya, Hina, and Eve unexpectedly drew a ticket sending them all the way to Kyushu. But when they arrived in Fukuoka, the destination board displayed the words "6 Tokyo" — Could this be a do-or-die moment, a miraculous comeback in the making?

title: RAISE-A-FIRE
overview: Hello, I'd like to book a free space. Yes, for a briefing on how to end the girls band era. Huh, the site? Oh, that works then. For five people, please.

title: Minna na cayosi.
overview: During a meeting one day, what caught Sakiko's eyes when she arrived at the office conference room was———

title: DOKIDOKI ☆ To Whom It May Concern
overview:
A bliss that envelops my whole body; A pleasant rasp in my throat; I can't stop the tears or the trembling.

To be invited to such a wonderful live performance— Just how fortunate am I?

title: Stargaze
overview: PO—PI-PI-PI-PI-PO-PO PO-PI-PPI-PI—, PO-PI-PO— PIPI—!

title: Christmas Eve
overview: Merry Chrismashido—! Santa Eve is on her way to deliver presents to those who behaved!

title: New Year with Everyone
overview: Happy New Year~ Speaking of which, we should gather at Arisa's place! Grab some snacks and drink~

title: Vroom Vroom Bike, Let's Go
overview: Nothing beats a hot canned coffee at a rest stop during a freezing ride.

title: Exciting! Travel Prep
overview: I’m really looking forward to the location shoot on the tropical island! What should I bring with me?

title: CHU²-P's Charisma Radio
overview: This program is a project to take the public airwaves and update the world with our revolutionary RAISE A SUILEN sound!

title: Special Collab! Nyamuchi Channel
overview: Good morning nyamu nyamu~! Nyamuchi here~! Let's welcome our special guests today! Please come in~!

title: Michelle in a Box
overview: Don't you get that awkward feeling when you lean in to press the elevator button, only to realize your floor has already been selected? "Oh, this person lives on my floor."

title: Farewell Is Bitter Like Dark Chocolate
overview: Farewells are always bitter, but I’ll never forget the days I spent with you.

title: BandedIn
overview:
If you want a job to work, BandedIn~

If you hate to be jobless, BandedIn~

Band-BandedIn in a band BandedIn~

BandedIn~

title: One Hundred Tales
overview:
So, this is a story I heard from a friend of Hiromachi’s... or well, I actually heard it from Tsu-chan.

One day, Tsu-chan went into an elevator. And then, all of a sudden...

title: After School Talk Time
overview: Chatting is just so much fun!

title: The Drifting Classroom
overview: Day after day, the credibility of the synopsis is drifting away... But this time, trust me oomf, the drift is classrooming, and food will run out in 3 days.

title: Udagawa Hypnotic Waves
overview: And now, you fall into a deep sleep!

title: Magical Girl Pappy, Muji GO!
overview:
The City of BanG... is in big trouble!

Monsters have arrived, and in just one night, the bustling downtown has been turned into a blazing sea of fire!  As their peaceful lives crumble, the Pappy, Muji GO! squad is forced into a high-stakes showdown right in the heart of the city.

Caught between the things they must protect and the world falling apart around them, can they save the day before everything is lost? Find out on a brand-new episode of Pappy, Muji GO! on BanG Dream! Network.

Magical Girl Pappy, Muji GO! Episode 26 ~Grilled Chicken for Dinner!?~

title: The Kitties of the Day
overview: Yukina and Rāna have been tapped to provide the narration for a brand-new program showcasing the world's most adorable cats. The recording session starts off smoothly, but as a parade of fluffy kittens appears on screen, her professional composure begins to crumble, and her logic vanishes into thin air.  By the end of the session, her sanity has reached its limit, leading to the ultimate baffling outburst: "I want to become that carrot!"

title: Kappo Kitazawa
overview: Deep in the heart of Chan-chan Town, on the rugged outskirts of Bandori City, lies a hidden culinary fortress: Kappo Kitazawa. Tonight, the scent of perfection is in the air—and another guest is about to step through those doors to see if they can beat the heat.

title: Trials of the Survival Tower
overview:
Forty-five band members find themselves inexplicably trapped on the top floor of a mysterious tower. Still reeling from the sudden turn of events, they are confronted by a mysterious Game Master who dictates a single condition for their escape: "Split into your respective bands, overcome the trials, and make your way down to the first floor."

The five members of Poppin'Party begin their desperate descent, but a relentless series of cruel traps eliminates them one by one. Soon, only Kasumi and Arisa remain.

Just steps away from the exit, Arisa rushes forward in a panic, causing the floor beneath her to collapse. Right as she is about to fall, Kasumi makes the ultimate sacrifice to pull Arisa to safety, vanishing into the dark abyss below with a final, lingering smile...

title: Can I Make Beef Jerky from It
overview: CHU²-sama, I wonder if a cow living in a desert tastes of sand too.
